merged_events.event_description: Embassy in Zanzibar established with Frederick P. Picard III as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: On December 10, 1963, the Embassy in Zanzibar was established with Frederick P. Picard III as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

merged_events.event_description: Embassy Zanzibar downgraded in rank to a Consulate General, effective June 27, 1964, following Zanzibar's union with Tanganyika on April 27, 1964.

evidence.quote: Frank C. Carlucci III was serving as Charge d'Affaires ad interim when Embassy Zanzibar was changed in rank to a Consulate General, effective June 27, 1964.

matched.notes: Exact match on date (1963-12-10) and status (Embassy). Both sources agree.

discrepancies.reasoning: The date matches exactly (1964-06-27), but the extracted event describes the downgrade as to a 'Consulate General,' while the CSV records it as 'Consulate.' Note that Event 1 has a CITATION ERROR flag, so the exact source wording is uncertain. However, the description consistently says 'Consulate General.' The CSV status category 'Consulate' may be used as a catch-all for both Consulate and Consulate General (since there is no separate 'Consulate General' category in the CSV schema), in which case this is effectively a match. But if the distinction matters, the source text likely says 'Consulate General,' not simply 'Consulate.' Marked as ambiguous because the CSV schema does not include a 'Consulate General' category, so 'Consulate' may be the correct coding choice even if the actual rank was Consulate General.
